task_description: Build the complete brand and visual identity system for the Quant Ecosystem in packages/brand/ and docs/brand/. Add missing apps (Maps, Photos), 6-theme system, Indic typography, WCAG contrast utilities, ~100 core icons, app icon set generation, per-app logos, and brand guidelines documentation.

verification.summary: typecheck passes with zero errors, all 33 tests pass, lint clean. V2 review issues addressed: QuantDrive logo circle lightened to #818CF8, QuantAI logo circle lightened to #A78BFA, light/colorblindSafe accentForeground changed to #000000, dark destructiveForeground changed to #000000, accent/destructive AA test coverage added.
